description_long: This is a hand-painted wooden doll resembling the classic character Pinocchio, featuring a rounded torso with a yellow shirt, brown vest, and green and brown patchwork details. The doll has a prominent conical hat with orange and brown stripes, a long pointed nose, and large, expressive eyes. Its arms and legs are made from white rope, ending in oversized, spherical wooden hands and flat, black shoes. The back of the doll shows painted-on buttons and seams, adding to its vintage, handcrafted appearance. The surface is matte with visible brush strokes, giving it a rustic, artisanal feel. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and designed for decorative or playful use.
description: A hand-painted wooden Pinocchio doll with a conical hat, rope limbs, and oversized wooden hands and shoes. The doll features a yellow shirt, brown vest, and expressive facial details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the conical hat, painted-on buttons, and patchwork details on the torso.
description_view_1: Front-left view highlighting the doll's face, long nose, large eyes, and the left rope arm with a round wooden hand.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the full face, pointed nose, both rope arms, and the flat black shoes.
description_view_3: Back-right view focusing on the side of the hat, the right rope arm, and the patchwork design on the back.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a painted-on yellow shirt with a brown vest, accented by green and brown patchwork panels, and features painted buttons and seams. The conical hat is orange with brown stripes, evoking a classic European folk costume reminiscent of Pinocchio's traditional attire.
attribute_pose: The doll is seated with its torso upright, head facing forward, arms extended outward and downward, and legs splayed forward with rope limbs bent at the joints. The hands and feet rest on the ground, giving a relaxed, static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with wide, round eyes, a straight mouth, and a long, protruding nose. The eyebrows are slightly arched, giving a mildly inquisitive look.
attribute_hair_style: Short, painted black hair with sideburns, partially covered by the conical hat.
